subcodes.first_line: O handmaidens of God! Through the might of his arm hath Jináb-i-Barzú obtained from 'Abdu'l-Bahá a letter for each of the kindred [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای کنیزان خدا جناب برزو بزور بازو از عبدالبهاء نامه بجهت هر یک از خویشان و
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @characteristics and conduct of true believers, @personal instructions
